Items.Title: Balogun reprieve ends in anti-climax as Belgium dump USA out
Items.Description: Folarin Balogun's red card reprieve appeared to hinder rather than help his country as an out-of-sorts USA side were thrashed 4-1 by Belgium to end the co-hosts' World Cup dreams.

Items.Title: 'Total calamity!' US gift Belgium a third goal
Items.Description: USA goalkeeper Matt Freese with a huge error in judgement as he gifts Belgium's Hans Vanaken the ball, leaving him with an easy finish that defender Tim Ream could've done more to stop. Errors all around as Belgium take control of the round of 16 tie.

Items.Title: Folarin Balogun handed new World Cup punishment after Belgium launch FIFA threat
Items.Description: US Men's National Team star Folarin Balogun has been in the headlines after his red card was overturned but FIFA have hit him with fresh sanctions
Items.Author: Stephen Killen

Items.Title: U.S. Soccer Men's National Team
Items.Description:
You believed. You filled stadiums. You brought the game into homes and communities across the country.

Most of all, you showed everyone what this crest means. Thank you. https://t.co/4lKfYb5mNB
Items.Author: U.S. Soccer Men's National Team
